# Ultima Online Server Developer

## What this sleeve does
Ultima Online Server Developer is a coder-domain sleeve focused on building, scripting, configuring, testing, and operating custom UO server environments.

## NeoStacks in this sleeve
- `S.01` Server Setup & Configuration Stack
- `S.02` World Building & Map Design Stack
- `S.03` Item & Equipment Scripting Stack
- `S.04` Mobile (NPC/Creature) Development Stack
- `S.05` Quest & Story Systems Stack
- `S.06` Custom Systems & Mechanics Stack
- `S.07` Server Administration & Management Stack
- `S.08` Testing & Deployment Stack

## NeoBlocks in this sleeve
The extracted public structure currently carries one explicit NeoBlock example:
- `N.03.01` Basic Item Creation

## MOLT blocks inside the extracted NeoBlock
- `TRG.UO.013` Item Creation Required
- `DIR.UO.013` Create Functional Custom Item
- `INST.ITEM.001` Basic Item Creation Procedure
- `SUBJ.ITEM.001` UO Item System Fundamentals
- `BP.ITEM.001` Item Script Template

## Notes
This sleeve is part of the public coder category and represents a domain-specialized server-development/operator posture.
